meaning: adj.抗生育的,反受精的,避孕的
examples: Gossypol, especially the (-) -gossypol, has the function of male antifertility, anti-cancer and anti-virus.
AIM: Peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMC) were cultured in vitro to study the effect of gossypol, a polyphenolic antifertility agent, on the activation of normal human t cells.
